title: Disclosure Shaping And Trust-Preserving Guardian Summaries
rationale: Guardian visibility must preserve trust rather than become transcript voyeurism. This bead shapes disclosures into bounded summaries, decisions, and safety-relevant signals instead of raw child transcript dumps.
focus_hint: Summaries should expose lesson progress, support needs, interventions, and safety-relevant events while suppressing unnecessary verbatim child language by default.
acceptance_criteria: Guardian summaries are structured and omit full transcript replay by default
Summary builder includes lesson progress, intervention points, and next recommended guardian actions
Disclosure policy distinguishes routine progress from escalation-relevant detail
Generated summaries preserve child trust boundaries while remaining useful to guardians
